CORRESPONDENCE VIA EXPRESS MAIL REC'D FROM DEFT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $420.00 FILED BY KELLY SANDRA JEAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SEERY MARY TERESA PILLAY INDRATHAN IAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO TERESA MARY SEERY RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEERY MARY TERESA PILLAY INDRATHAN IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY SANDRA JEAN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KELLY SANDRA JEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SEERY MARY TERESA PILLAY INDRATHAN IAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY SANDRA JEAN
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO KELLY SANDRA JEAN RETURNED NO MAIL RECEPTACLE.
